title: [FIRRTL][LowerLayers] Cannot send rwprobe out of layer

features.name: rwprobe output port exposing layer-internal wire
features.description: Code should include a module output port of type RWProbe that references a wire defined inside a layer block
features.snippet:
module L(output p: RWProbe<UInt<1>, T>)
  layerblock T:
    wire w: UInt<1>
    define p = rwprobe(w)

features.name: layer block containing rwprobe operation
features.description: Code should include a layer block containing a wire and an rwprobe operation that references that wire
features.snippet:
layerblock T:
  wire w: UInt<1>
  define p = rwprobe(w)

features.name: inner symbol reference in rwprobe crossing layer boundary
features.description: Code should include an rwprobe operation with an inner symbol reference target that is defined inside a layer but referenced from outside that layer
